name: NPS Calculator
description: Estimate growth of National Pension Scheme investments.

example.explanation: NPS investments grow with compounding returns over the investment period.

faqs.question: Can I withdraw before retirement?
faqs.answer: Withdrawals are limited before retirement; most funds are locked in until retirement.

faqs.question: What is the tax benefit?
faqs.answer: NPS contributions can qualify for tax deductions under Section 80C and 80CCD.

faqs.question: What tax treatment does NPS have?
faqs.answer: NPS offers EEE (Exempt-Exempt-Exempt) tax treatment in many cases.
